001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections;
018
019import static java.util.Collections.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.function.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.Json;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033
034/**
035 * Java implementation of a JSON object.
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * This class is a subclass of {@link MarshalledMap} that carries strict-JSON-specific surface, including
039 * strict-JSON {@link #toString()} (via {@link Json#of(Object)}), {@link JsonParser}-defaulting
040 * {@link CharSequence} / {@link Reader} constructors, and convenience methods for serializing to the
041 * various JSON dialects (JSON5, JSON Lines, canonical JSON, HJSON).
042 *
043 * <p>
044 * <b>v10.0 behavioral break:</b> {@code toString()} now produces strict (RFC 8259) JSON (was JSON5),
045 * and the {@link CharSequence} / {@link Reader} constructors now default to {@link JsonParser#DEFAULT}
046 * (was {@link Json5Parser#DEFAULT}). For the previous JSON5 behavior use {@link Json5Map}.
047 *
048 * <p>
049 * Note that the use of this class is optional for generating JSON. The serializers will accept any objects that implement the
050 * {@link Map} interface.  But this class provides some useful additional functionality when working with
051 * JSON models constructed from Java Collections Framework objects.  For example, a constructor is provided for
052 * converting a JSON object string directly into a {@link Map}.  It also contains accessor methods for to avoid common
053 * typecasting when accessing elements in a list.
054 *
055 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
056 * <p class='bjava'>
057 *    <jc>// Construct an empty Map</jc>
058 *    JsonMap <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>of</jsm>();
059 *
060 *    <jc>// Construct a Map from JSON</jc>
061 *    <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>ofString</jsm>(<js>"{a:'A',b:{c:'C',d:123}}"</js>);
062 *
063 *    <jc>// Construct a Map using the append method</jc>
064 *    <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>of</jsm>().a(<js>"foo"</js>,<js>"x"</js>).a(<js>"bar"</js>,123).a(<js>"baz"</js>,<jk>true</jk>);
065 *
066 *    <jc>// Construct a Map from XML generated by XmlSerializer</jc>
067 *    String <jv>xml</jv> = <js>"&lt;object&gt;&lt;a type='string'&gt;A&lt;/a&gt;&lt;b type='object'&gt;&lt;c type='string'&gt;C&lt;/c&gt;&lt;d type='number'&gt;123&lt;/d&gt;&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/object&gt;"</js>;
068 *    <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>of</jsm>(<jv>xml</jv>, XmlParser.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>);
069 *
070 *    <jc>// Construct a Map from a URL GET parameter string generated by UrlEncodingParser</jc>
071 *    String <jv>urlParams</jv> = <js>"?a='A'&amp;b={c:'C',d:123}"</js>;
072 *    <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>of</jsm>(<jv>urlParams</jv>, UrlEncodingParser.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>);
073 *
074 *    <jc>// Construct JSON from JsonMap</jc>
075 *    <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>ofString</jsm>(<js>"{foo:'bar'},{baz:[123,true]}"</js>);
076 *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.toString();  <jc>// Produces "{foo:'bar'},{baz:[123,true]}"</jc>
077 *    <jv>json</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.toString(JsonSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>);  <jc>// Equivalent</jc>
078 *    <jv>json</jv> = JsonSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>map</jv>);  <jc>// Equivalent</jc>
079 *
080 *    <jc>// Get a map entry as an Integer</jc>
081 *    <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>ofString</jsm>(<js>"{foo:123}"</js>);
082 *    Integer <jv>integer</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.getInt(<js>"foo"</js>);
083 *    <jv>integer</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.get(Integer.<jk>class</jk>, <js>"foo"</js>);  <jc>// Equivalent</jc>
084 *
085 *    <jc>// Add an inner map</jc>
086 *    JsonMap <jv>map1</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>ofString</jsm>(<js>"{a:1}"</js>);
087 *    JsonMap <jv>map2</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>ofString</jsm>(<js>"{b:2}"</js>).setInner(<jv>map1</jv>);
088 *    <jk>int</jk> <jv>_int</jv> = <jv>map2</jv>.getInt(<js>"a"</js>);  <jc>// a == 1 </jc>
089 * </p>
090 *
091 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
092 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
093 * </ul>
094 */
095@SuppressWarnings({
096   "java:S2160" // equals() / hashCode() inherited from MarshalledMap; map equality is element-based
097})
098public class JsonMap extends MarshalledMap {
099
100   @SuppressWarnings({
101      "java:S2160", // equals() / hashCode() inherited from JsonMap; map equality is element-based
102      "java:S110" // Inheritance depth is intentional in the marshalled-map hierarchy.
103   })
104   private static class UnmodifiableJsonMap extends JsonMap {
105      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
106
107      @SuppressWarnings({
108         "synthetic-access" // Access to outer class members is intentional
109      })
110      UnmodifiableJsonMap(JsonMap contents) {
111         if (nn(contents))
112            contents.forEach(super::put);
113      }
114
115      @Override
116      public void clear() {
117         throw uoroex();
118      }
119
120      @Override
121      public Object compute(String key, BiFunction<? super String, ? super Object, ?> remappingFunction) {
122         throw uoroex();
123      }
124
125      @Override
126      public Object computeIfAbsent(String key, Function<? super String, ?> mappingFunction) {
127         throw uoroex();
128      }
129
130      @Override
131      public Object computeIfPresent(String key, BiFunction<? super String, ? super Object, ?> remappingFunction) {
132         throw uoroex();
133      }
134
135      @Override
136      public Set<Map.Entry<String,Object>> entrySet() {
137         return Collections.unmodifiableSet(super.entrySet());
138      }
139
140      @Override
141      public boolean isUnmodifiable() { return true; }
142
143      @Override
144      public Set<String> keySet() {
145         return Collections.unmodifiableSet(super.keySet());
146      }
147
148      @Override
149      public Object merge(String key, Object value, BiFunction<? super Object, ? super Object, ?> remappingFunction) {
150         throw uoroex();
151      }
152
153      @Override
154      public Object put(String key, Object val) {
155         throw uoroex();
156      }
157
158      @Override
159      public void putAll(Map<? extends String, ?> m) {
160         throw uoroex();
161      }
162
163      @Override
164      public Object putIfAbsent(String key, Object value) {
165         throw uoroex();
166      }
167
168      @Override
169      public Object remove(Object key) {
170         throw uoroex();
171      }
172
173      @Override
174      public boolean remove(Object key, Object value) {
175         throw uoroex();
176      }
177
178      @Override
179      public Object replace(String key, Object value) {
180         throw uoroex();
181      }
182
183      @Override
184      public boolean replace(String key, Object oldValue, Object newValue) {
185         throw uoroex();
186      }
187
188      @Override
189      public void replaceAll(BiFunction<? super String, ? super Object, ?> function) {
190         throw uoroex();
191      }
192
193      @Override
194      public Collection<Object> values() {
195         return Collections.unmodifiableCollection(super.values());
196      }
197   }
198
199   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
200
201   /**
202    * An empty read-only JsonMap.
203    *
204    * @serial exclude
205    */
206   @SuppressWarnings({
207      "java:S2386", // Public static final field accessed externally, cannot be protected
208      "java:S110" // Anonymous JsonMap subtype intentionally inherits deep collection hierarchy.
209   })
210   public static final JsonMap EMPTY_MAP = new JsonMap() {
211
212      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
213
214      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
215      public Set<Map.Entry<String,Object>> entrySet() {
216         return Collections.<String,Object>emptyMap().entrySet();
217      }
218
219      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
220      public Set<String> keySet() {
221         return Collections.<String,Object>emptyMap().keySet();
222      }
223
224      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
225      public Object put(String key, Object value) {
226         throw uoroex();
227      }
228
229      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
230      public Object remove(Object key) {
231         throw uoroex();
232      }
233
234      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
235      public Collection<Object> values() {
236         return emptyMap().values();
237      }
238   };
239
240   /**
241    * Construct an empty map.
242    *
243    * @return An empty map.
244    */
245   public static JsonMap create() {
246      return new JsonMap();
247   }
248
249   /**
250    * Construct an empty filtered map.
251    *
252    * @return An empty map.
253    */
254   public static JsonMap filteredMap() {
255      return create().filtered();
256   }
257
258   /**
259    * Construct a filtered map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
260    *
261    * <p>
262    * Same as {@link #of(Object...)} but calls {@link #filtered()} on the created map.
263    *
264    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
265    * @return A new map, never <jk>null</jk>.
266    */
267   public static JsonMap filteredMap(Object...keyValuePairs) {
268      return new JsonMap(keyValuePairs).filtered();
269   }
270
271   /**
272    * Construct a map initialized with the specified map.
273    *
274    * @param values
275    *    The map to copy.
276    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
277    *    <br>Keys will be converted to strings using {@link Object#toString()}.
278    * @return A new map or <jk>null</jk> if the map was <jk>null</jk>.
279    */
280   public static JsonMap of(Map<?,?> values) {
281      return values == null ? null : new JsonMap(values);
282   }
283
284   /**
285    * Construct a map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
286    *
287    * <h5 class='section'>Examples:</h5>
288    * <p class='bjava'>
289    *    JsonMap <jv>map</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonMap(<js>"key1"</js>,<js>"val1"</js>,<js>"key2"</js>,<js>"val2"</js>);
290    * </p>
291    *
292    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
293    * @return A new map, never <jk>null</jk>.
294    */
295   public static JsonMap of(Object...keyValuePairs) {
296      return new JsonMap(keyValuePairs);
297   }
298
299   /**
300    * Construct a map initialized with the specified JSON string.
301    *
302    * @param json
303    *    The JSON text to parse.
304    *    <br>Can be normal or simplified JSON.
305    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
306    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
307    */
308   public static JsonMap ofString(CharSequence json) throws ParseException {
309      return json == null ? new JsonMap() : new JsonMap(json);
310   }
311
312   /**
313    * Construct a map initialized with the specified reader containing JSON.
314    *
315    * @param json
316    *    The reader containing JSON text to parse.
317    *    <br>Can contain normal or simplified JSON.
318    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
319    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
320    */
321   public static JsonMap ofString(Reader json) throws ParseException {
322      return json == null ? new JsonMap() : new JsonMap(json);
323   }
324
325   /**
326    * Construct a map initialized with the specified string.
327    *
328    * @param in The input being parsed.
329    * @param p
330    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
331    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link JsonParser}.
332    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
333    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
334    */
335   public static JsonMap ofString(CharSequence in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
336      return in == null ? new JsonMap() : new JsonMap(in, p);
337   }
338
339   /**
340    * Construct a map initialized with the specified string.
341    *
342    * @param in
343    *    The reader containing the input being parsed.
344    *    <br>Can contain normal or simplified JSON.
345    * @param p
346    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
347    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link JsonParser}.
348    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
349    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
350    */
351   public static JsonMap ofString(Reader in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
352      return in == null ? new JsonMap() : new JsonMap(in, p);
353   }
354
355   /**
356    * Construct an empty map.
357    */
358   public JsonMap() {}
359
360   /**
361    * Construct an empty map with the specified bean context.
362    *
363    * @param session The bean session to use for creating beans.
364    */
365   public JsonMap(MarshallingSession session) {
366      super(session);
367   }
368
369   /**
370    * Construct a map initialized with the specified JSON.
371    *
372    * @param json
373    *    The JSON text to parse.
374    *    <br>Must be strict (RFC 8259) JSON; for JSON5 input use {@link Json5Map} or pass
375    *    {@link Json5Parser#DEFAULT} explicitly.
376    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
377    */
378   public JsonMap(CharSequence json) throws ParseException {
379      this(json, JsonParser.DEFAULT);
380   }
381
382   /**
383    * Construct a map initialized with the specified string.
384    *
385    * @param in
386    *    The input being parsed.
387    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
388    * @param p
389    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
390    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link JsonParser}.
391    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
392    */
393   public JsonMap(CharSequence in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
394      super(in, p == null ? JsonParser.DEFAULT : p);
395   }
396
397   /**
398    * Construct a map initialized with the specified map.
399    *
400    * @param in
401    *    The map to copy.
402    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
403    *    <br>Keys will be converted to strings using {@link Object#toString()}.
404    */
405   public JsonMap(Map<?,?> in) {
406      super(in);
407   }
408
409   /**
410    * Construct a map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
411    *
412    * <h5 class='section'>Examples:</h5>
413    * <p class='bjava'>
414    *    JsonMap <jv>map</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonMap(<js>"key1"</js>,<js>"val1"</js>,<js>"key2"</js>,<js>"val2"</js>);
415    * </p>
416    *
417    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
418    */
419   public JsonMap(Object...keyValuePairs) {
420      super(keyValuePairs);
421   }
422
423   /**
424    * Construct a map initialized with the specified reader containing JSON.
425    *
426    * @param json
427    *    The reader containing JSON text to parse.
428    *    <br>Must be strict (RFC 8259) JSON; for JSON5 input use {@link Json5Map} or pass
429    *    {@link Json5Parser#DEFAULT} explicitly.
430    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
431    */
432   public JsonMap(Reader json) throws ParseException {
433      this(json, JsonParser.DEFAULT);
434   }
435
436   /**
437    * Construct a map initialized with the specified string.
438    *
439    * @param in
440    *    The reader containing the input being parsed.
441    *    <br>Must be strict (RFC 8259) JSON.
442    * @param p
443    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
444    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link JsonParser}.
445    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
446    */
447   public JsonMap(Reader in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
448      super(in, p == null ? JsonParser.DEFAULT : p);
449   }
450
451   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
452   public JsonMap append(Map<String,Object> values) {
453      super.append(values);
454      return this;
455   }
456
457   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
458   public JsonMap append(String key, Object value) {
459      super.append(key, value);
460      return this;
461   }
462
463   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
464   @SuppressWarnings({
465      "unchecked", // Generic varargs is safe here: values are only iterated, not stored into a typed array.
466      "varargs"
467   })
468   public <T> JsonMap appendFirst(Predicate<T> test, String key, T...values) {
469      super.appendFirst(test, key, values);
470      return this;
471   }
472
473   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
474   public JsonMap appendIf(boolean flag, String key, Object value) {
475      super.appendIf(flag, key, value);
476      return this;
477   }
478
479   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
480   public <T> JsonMap appendIf(Predicate<T> test, String key, T value) {
481      super.appendIf(test, key, value);
482      return this;
483   }
484
485   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
486   public JsonMap appendIfAbsent(String key, Object value) {
487      super.appendIfAbsent(key, value);
488      return this;
489   }
490
491   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
492   public <T> JsonMap appendIfAbsentIf(Predicate<T> predicate, String key, T value) {
493      super.appendIfAbsentIf(predicate, key, value);
494      return this;
495   }
496
497   /**
498    * Serializes this map to a standard JSON string.
499    *
500    * @return This object as a standard JSON string.
501    */
502   public String toJson() {
503      return Json.of(this);
504   }
505
506   /**
507    * Serializes this map to a JSON5 string.
508    *
509    * <p>
510    * A synonym for {@link #toString()}.
511    *
512    * @return This object as a JSON5 string.
513    */
514   public String toJson5() {
515      return Json5.of(this);
516   }
517
518   /**
519    * Serializes this map to a JSON Lines string.
520    *
521    * @return This object as a JSON Lines string.
522    */
523   public String toJsonl() {
524      return Jsonl.of(this);
525   }
526
527   /**
528    * Serializes this map to a canonical JSON string (RFC 8785).
529    *
530    * @return This object as a canonical JSON string.
531    */
532   public String toJcs() {
533      return Jcs.of(this);
534   }
535
536   /**
537    * Serializes this map to an HJSON string.
538    *
539    * @return This object as an HJSON string.
540    */
541   public String toHjson() {
542      return Hjson.of(this);
543   }
544
545   /**
546    * Serializes this map to a readable (indented) JSON5 string using {@link Json5Serializer#DEFAULT_READABLE}.
547    *
548    * @return This object serialized as a readable JSON5 string.
549    */
550   public String toReadableJson5() {
551      if (Json5Serializer.DEFAULT_READABLE == null)
552         return s(this);
553      return Json5Serializer.DEFAULT_READABLE.toString(this);
554   }
555
556   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
557   public JsonMap exclude(String...keys) {
558      var m2 = new JsonMap();
559      this.forEach((k, v) -> {
560         var exclude = false;
561         for (var kk : keys)
562            if (kk.equals(k))
563               exclude = true;
564         if (! exclude)
565            m2.put(k, v);
566      });
567      return m2;
568   }
569
570   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
571   public JsonMap filtered() {
572      super.filtered();
573      return this;
574   }
575
576   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
577   public JsonMap filtered(Predicate<Object> value) {
578      super.filtered(value);
579      return this;
580   }
581
582   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
583   public JsonList findList(String...keys) {
584      return find(JsonList.class, keys);
585   }
586
587   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
588   public JsonMap findMap(String...keys) {
589      return find(JsonMap.class, keys);
590   }
591
592   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
593   public JsonList getList(String key) {
594      return get(key, JsonList.class);
595   }
596
597   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
598   public JsonList getList(String key, boolean createIfNotExists) {
599      JsonList m = getWithDefault(key, null, JsonList.class);
600      if (m == null && createIfNotExists) {
601         m = new JsonList();
602         put(key, m);
603      }
604      return m;
605   }
606
607   /**
608    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link JsonList}.
609    *
610    * @param key The key.
611    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
612    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
613    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
614    */
615   public JsonList getList(String key, JsonList defVal) {
616      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, JsonList.class);
617   }
618
619   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
620   public JsonMap getMap(String key) {
621      return get(key, JsonMap.class);
622   }
623
624   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
625   public JsonMap getMap(String key, boolean createIfNotExists) {
626      var m = getWithDefault(key, null, JsonMap.class);
627      if (m == null && createIfNotExists) {
628         m = new JsonMap();
629         put(key, m);
630      }
631      return m;
632   }
633
634   /**
635    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link JsonMap}.
636    *
637    * @param key The key.
638    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
639    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
640    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
641    */
642   public JsonMap getMap(String key, JsonMap defVal) {
643      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, JsonMap.class);
644   }
645
646   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
647   public JsonMap include(String...keys) {
648      var m2 = new JsonMap();
649      this.forEach((k, v) -> {
650         for (var kk : keys)
651            if (kk.equals(k))
652               m2.put(kk, v);
653      });
654      return m2;
655   }
656
657   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
658   public JsonMap inner(Map<String,Object> inner) {
659      super.inner(inner);
660      return this;
661   }
662
663   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
664   public JsonMap keepAll(String...keys) {
665      super.keepAll(keys);
666      return this;
667   }
668
669   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
670   public JsonMap modifiable() {
671      if (isUnmodifiable())
672         return new JsonMap(this);
673      return this;
674   }
675
676   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
677   protected JsonMap newMarshalledMap(MarshallingSession bs) {
678      return new JsonMap(bs);
679   }
680
681   /**
682    * Convenience method for inserting JSON directly into an attribute on this object.
683    *
684    * <p>
685    * The JSON text can be an object (i.e. <js>"{...}"</js>) or an array (i.e. <js>"[...]"</js>).
686    *
687    * <p>
688    * Input must be strict (RFC 8259) JSON; for JSON5 use {@link Json5Map#putJson5(String,String)}.
689    *
690    * @param key The key.
691    * @param json The JSON text that will be parsed into an Object and then inserted into this map.
692    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
693    */
694   public void putJson(String key, String json) throws ParseException {
695      this.put(key, JsonParser.DEFAULT.parse(json, Object.class));
696   }
697
698   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
699   public JsonMap session(MarshallingSession session) {
700      super.session(session);
701      return this;
702   }
703
704   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
705   public JsonMap setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value) {
706      super.setBeanSession(value);
707      return this;
708   }
709
710   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
711   public String toString() {
712      return Json.of(this);
713   }
714
715   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
716   public JsonMap unmodifiable() {
717      if (this instanceof UnmodifiableJsonMap this2)
718         return this2;
719      return new UnmodifiableJsonMap(this);
720   }
721
722   /**
723    * Convenience method for serializing this map to the specified <c>Writer</c> using the
724    * {@link JsonSerializer#DEFAULT} serializer.
725    *
726    * @param w The writer to serialize this object to.
727    * @return This object.
728    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred trying to write to the writer.
729    * @throws SerializeException If a problem occurred trying to convert the output.
730    */
731   public JsonMap writeTo(Writer w) throws IOException, SerializeException {
732      JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.serialize(this, w);
733      return this;
734   }
735}
